summary: Cuenta de Cobro Signature & Bank Details Bug Fix Verification - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API correctly saves and returns signature, signatureRotation, and bank details (from.bank, from.bankAccount). Frontend correctly displays these fields when loading an existing invoice.

verified_working: POST /api/invoices - correctly saves signature, signatureRotation, from.bank, from.bankAccount
GET /api/invoices/{id} - correctly returns all fields after reload
Signature image displays correctly with uploaded base64 data
Rotate button appears when signature is loaded
Bank details (Banco, Cuenta) display in DATOS PARA PAGO section of Cuenta de Cobro template

critical_code_review_comments: InvoiceBase model in /app/backend/models/invoice.py correctly defines signature (Optional[str]) and signatureRotation (Optional[int]=0)
Address model correctly defines bank (Optional[str]) and bankAccount (Optional[str])
InvoiceCreator.jsx loadInvoice function correctly loads fromAddress data including bank details
InvoiceTemplateCuentaCobro.jsx correctly renders signature image with rotation transform and bank details in DATOS PARA PAGO section
seed_data_creation: Created multiple Cuenta de Cobro invoices with TEST_ prefix for signature and bank details testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. The signature, signatureRotation, bank, and bankAccount fields are now correctly persisted in MongoDB and returned by the API. Frontend displays all fields correctly when editing existing invoices. Main agent's note about 1x1 pixel test image being invisible was correct - the visual test with a proper signature image shows it renders correctly.

bug_verification.original_issue: Signature, signatureRotation, and bank details (from.bank, from.bankAccount) not persisting when saving Cuenta de Cobro
evidence: API test: POST creates invoice with all fields, GET returns all fields after reload
API test: PUT updates all fields correctly, GET verifies persistence
Frontend: Signature image displays with rotation, Rotate button visible
Frontend: Bank details (Bancolombia, 1234567890) displayed in preview
